name: Cone of Cold
components: M (a small crystal or glass cone)
description: You unleash a blast of cold air. Each creature in a 60-foot Cone originating from you makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 8d8 Cold damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature killed by this spell becomes a frozen statue until it thaws. When using a higher-level spell slot, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5.
